summary: Comprehensive testing of TB Detection AI system completed successfully. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend navigation and authentication flows functional, file upload and analysis pipeline operational.
passed_tests: Backend API authentication (admin login, user registration, logout, /auth/me)
Backend API protection (401 responses for unauthenticated requests)
TB prediction API with image upload and AI model inference
Stats API returning user scan statistics
Frontend landing page with hero section and navigation buttons
Frontend login/logout flow with admin credentials
Frontend user registration flow with new user creation
Frontend dashboard with stats cards and quick actions
Frontend analysis page with file upload zone
Frontend file upload functionality with image preview
Frontend analysis workflow (upload -> preview -> analyze -> error handling)
Frontend about page with CNN and Grad-CAM explanations
Frontend sidebar navigation between all pages
Frontend responsive design and glassmorphism theme

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - 1 expected error for test image)
